title: galium gracilens
intro: Galium gracilens, also known as Prairie Galium, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Galium gracilens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
